changelog.title: Tray Redirects, Boost Mode Renaming, and Update Controls & Rollback UI
highlights: Enabled tray Show Dashboard click/double-click events to automatically restore and redirect users to the Dashboard
Renamed user-facing 'Game Mode' labels and badges to 'Boost Mode' to align with backend optimization contexts
Added manual Pause and Cancel action buttons for active update downloads
Implemented a System Recovery & Rollback panel to trigger offline backup restoration natively

changelog.title: Use public WebSearchEngine search API for game fallback classification
highlights: Use public WebSearchEngine search API for game fallback classification

changelog.title: Support dynamic RAWG fallback database scan for 1 lakh+ games
highlights: Support dynamic RAWG fallback database scan for 1 lakh+ games

changelog.title: Support FPS genre mapping in preset recommendations
highlights: Support FPS genre mapping in preset recommendations

changelog.title: Support dynamic RTX 60+ series and auto-configure presets
highlights: Support dynamic RTX 60+ series and auto-configure presets

changelog.title: Subsequent Update Check Overrides
highlights: Enabled check for newer system updates even when an update has already been downloaded and is waiting for client restart
Added Check Again trigger endpoints to both tab headings and relaunch prompts

changelog.title: Configurable Auto-Update Control
highlights: Added a configurable background auto-download switch for core system updates
Allows toggling auto-download on or off to choose when to initiate update downloads manually

changelog.title: Updater Controls, Database Persistence & Website Mongoose Migration
highlights: Implemented manual update cancellation and offline rollback backup/restoration mechanisms
Migrated desktop SQLite agent memory to write into user APPDATA folder, fixing production persistence
Removed ChromaDB dependency to reduce PyInstaller package size and resolved native C++ compilation issues
Migrated website issues list, documentation, and architecture layers to Mongoose/MongoDB
Refactored website architecture page into Server and Client components for Turbopack compatibility

changelog.title: Check For Updates Logo Stylization
highlights: Updated Check For Updates tray icon to be white and borderless

changelog.title: Remove Mission Briefs, update tray icon, and finalize TGP telemetry
highlights: Deleted Mission Briefs and associated local mdx briefs
Updated Check For Updates tray icon to match Windows Update logo
Updated release notes readmes with precise TGP & CPU Offset documentation

changelog.title: Apply offset for ACPI CPU temp
highlights: Subtracts 12C from ACPI TZ01 to approximate CPU Package avg under blocked driver mode

changelog.title: Precision TGP and CPU Thermal fallbacks
highlights: Precision TGP and CPU Thermal fallbacks

changelog.title: Bypass code signature verification for self-built updates and robustify download updater
highlights: Bypass code signature verification for self-built updates and robustify download updater

changelog.title: Update system tray check updates menu icon to match flat white style
highlights: Update system tray check updates menu icon to match flat white style

changelog.title: Fix Object Destroyed Electron Crash
highlights: Guarded all asynchronous loadURL retries, event listener invocations, and ready-to-show transitions with isDestroyed() checks on BrowserWindow instances.
Prevents application crashes caused by delayed callbacks firing after a window (Dashboard, HUD, or OSR) has been closed by the user or system.

changelog.title: True FPS for Fullscreen Exclusive Games
highlights: Added DxgKrnl kernel-mode ETW event handling so fullscreen exclusive games (e.g. Spider-Man 2, DX12/Vulkan titles) now report real hardware FPS instead of N/A.
DXGI user-mode events are preferred in windowed/borderless mode; DxgKrnl events are automatically activated only when DXGI goes silent (fullscreen exclusive), preventing double-counting.

changelog.title: Fix UAC Startup Crash & Settings Tweaks
highlights: Deferred Python backend launch until after Electron ready-to-show to prevent UAC dimming crash.
Renamed 'Power Save' preset to 'Standard' and removed obsolete 'ANSEL' from feature detection.

changelog.title: Fix Splash Screen Startup Crash
highlights: Bundled splash.html to dist-electron during build to resolve ERR_FILE_NOT_FOUND error on startup.
Added safe catch handlers on splash screen load functions to prevent unhandled promise rejections.

changelog.title: Fix Unused Game Launch Variable & Stability Graph Reset
highlights: Fixed linting warning by removing unused handleLaunch variable in GameCard.
Fixed Stability Lab chart history reset logic when games are inactive.

changelog.title: Fix Misleading FPS Telemetry
highlights: Removed capture_fps fallback in HUD telemetry to prevent showing low capture loop rates as game FPS when ETW tracking is unavailable.

changelog.title: Fix HUD interaction usability and positioning deadlock
highlights: Fixed UX deadlock where the HUD overlay would immediately hide itself upon Alt-Tabbing out of a game, preventing any mouse interaction, dragging, or closing when unlocked.

changelog.title: Stability Update: HUD Calibration, FPS Fallback, and API Reliability
highlights: Fixed permanently stuck HUD CALIBRATING state by changing the flag condition and introducing a 10s timeout.
Fixed FPS showing N/A in fullscreen and Vulkan/OpenGL games (e.g. Spider-Man 2) by fallback to capture-loop FPS.
Fixed GameKB infinite retry storm on LLM connection errors by enforcing a 5-minute per-game cooldown.
Fixed installer shortcut removal and ensured silent cleanup of legacy per-user scope installations.

changelog.title: Fix FPS showing N/A for non-ETW games (e.g. Spider-Man 2)
highlights: Restored capture-loop FPS as fallback when the ETW hardware tracker returns no data
Affects all games where DXGI Present ETW events are unavailable (fullscreen exclusive, Vulkan, OpenGL, or admin-permission issues)

changelog.title: Fix GameKB infinite retry storm on LLM 404
highlights: GameKB keybind fetch failures (404, timeout, etc.) now enforce a 5-minute per-game cooldown before retrying
Cooldown check added at both thread-spawn site (identify_game) and background worker to guarantee no storm
Successful fetches clear the failure record so retries resume normally after an endpoint recovers

changelog.title: Fix permanently stuck HUD CALIBRATING state
highlights: Fixed: game_loading flag now clears after 10 s even if the ETW FPS tracker returns no data (Vulkan, OpenGL, or elevated-permission failures)
Changed CALIBRATING condition from 'frame_count<30 OR fps==0' to 'frame_count<30 AND fps==0', preventing infinite stuck state

changelog.title: Fix missing shortcuts and uninstall legacy versions during upgrade
highlights: Protect machine-wide desktop shortcuts from being deleted during cleanup
Automatically and silently uninstall legacy per-user installations during per-machine upgrades

changelog.title: Fix default version fallback and newly downloaded launcher games classification
highlights: Copy app-update.yml to packaged resources so native updates can resolve successfully
Automatically map newly scanned Local games to their correct platforms (Steam, Epic, EA Desktop, etc.) based on install/exe paths
Merge duplicate scanned game metadata keys to preserve direct paths alongside platform mappings

changelog.title: Fix latest.yml UTF-8 BOM encoding for electron-updater support
highlights: Fix latest.yml UTF-8 BOM encoding for electron-updater support

changelog.title: Fix packaging of rapidocr_onnxruntime ONNX models and config assets
highlights: Fix packaging of rapidocr_onnxruntime ONNX models and config assets

changelog.title: Hotfix: HUD FPS tracking and GPU power draw improvements
highlights: Restored MPO events (IDs 46, 73, 78) to fix N/A FPS readings in modern DX12 games
Implemented a 1ms event debounce to completely prevent double-counting of duplicate Present/MPO events
Added NVML fallback to enforced power limit to resolve anomalous 300+W GPU power reporting on laptops and specific cards
Changed CPU clock speed formatting in compact HUD from 'G' to 'GHz' to prevent confusion with RAM capacity
Fixed a critical bug where the C++ ETW frame tracker would permanently freeze (causing stuck 'Calibrating' HUD state) after any 5s+ frame stall

changelog.title: Fix HUD FPS tracking double-counting and remove misleading fallback
highlights: Fix ETW frame timing double-counting by restricting DXGI events to Present_Start (eventId 42) and D3D9 to Present (eventId 1)
Remove misleading capture_fps fallback in HUD telemetry to prevent showing low capture rates when ETW/DXGI tracking is not active

changelog.title: Move Optimization Status block to Stability Lab next to Game Mode toggle
highlights: Move Optimization Status block to Stability Lab next to Game Mode toggle

highlights: Fix NSIS compile escape syntax in installer.nsh

highlights: Fix duplicate start menu shortcuts and update overlay blocking

highlights: Fixed the USE DESKTOP UPGRADE

highlights: Fixed the Frozen Update and making soe issue.

highlights: Fixed the OCR

changelog.title: Fix OCR Reader, TTS Thread stability, and Update Page UI
highlights: Fix OCR pre-warming error by calling _ensure_rapidocr_reader
Update settings, documentation, and requirements to transition fully to RapidOCR
Fix TTS thread crashes in voice_manager by validating SAPI5 COM dispatch at startup and implementing config setters in PyTTSX3 fallback
Fix missing release highlights when up-to-date and system tray update check behavior when minimized

changelog.title: DirectX 9 / Fullscreen FPS Fix and Publisher GUI Enhancements
highlights: Extended ETW C++ engine with D3D9 and DxgKrnl providers to enable FPS tracking in DX9 and Exclusive Fullscreen games.
Redesigned Publisher GUI with drag-and-drop image uploads, dynamic version previews, and document-aware auto-generation.
Added MSI and Portable ZIP installer download links to the website landing page.

highlights: Disable GPU sandbox globally on Windows to fix black screen

changelog.title: Fix black screen issue and duplicate Start Menu shortcuts
highlights: Enabled GPU acceleration for transparent windows and Mica effects by replacing the global hardware acceleration disable with a selective GPU sandbox bypass on elevated instances.
Added automatic cleanup of duplicate user-level Start Menu and Desktop shortcuts left from previous installations during the installer run.

changelog.title: Resolve MEM0_API_KEY resolution and allow copy of specific terminal log lines
highlights: Added fallback to load .env in memory.py, fixed config_loader tests, and added hover copy buttons to individual dashboard log lines.

changelog.title: Restore CPU power estimation fallback
highlights: Restored CPU power estimation math when hardware sensor readings are unavailable so that CPU wattage shows up on the HUD.

changelog.title: Alternate Switch Account between Google and Discord
highlights: Configured Switch Account in Settings to sign out and auto-login with Google/Discord depending on the current provider.
